name: Steak Lo Mein (Ngo Yoke Lo Mein: Canton
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions. Drain.
2. Slice steak against the grain into thin pieces, about 2 inches long.
3. Shred carrot and celery.
4. In a bowl, mix steak, ginger, scallion, cornstarch, sugar, and 1 tablespoon light soy sauce.
5. In another bowl, mix salt and 1 tablespoon light soy sauce.
6. Heat oil in a frying pan. Add the steak mixture and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
7. Remove the steak mixture from the pan.
8. Add shredded carrot and celery to the pan. Stir in 1/4 cup water, lower heat, and cover.
9. Cook for 2 minutes.
10. Add bean sprouts and stir for a few seconds.
11. If using cabbage, add it along with the celery.
12. Add cooked spaghetti to the pan. Stir well and cook for 2 more minutes.
13. Add the salt and soy sauce mixture and the steak back into the pan. Mix well and serve.
